animalHospitalCodes.title: Animal Hospital Codes
animalHospitalCodes.intro: Animal Hospital currently focuses on shift survival, Animal Coins, classes, shop items, and anomaly detection. Track the code status here and watch the official Roblox game, group, and Discord for new code drops.

items.label: Active Codes
items.value: No active Animal Hospital codes are available right now.
items.action: Check the official Discord and Roblox group for future code drops.

items.label: Expired Codes
items.value: No expired Animal Hospital codes are listed.
items.action: Keep old code lists separate from active rewards to avoid fake code clutter.

items.label: Redeem System
items.value: No public code redemption flow is listed for Animal Hospital yet.
items.reward: Future rewards may include Animal Coins, shop items, or event bonuses.
items.action: Use official announcements as the first source before adding any new code.

animalHospitalBeginnerGuide.title: How to Play Animal Hospital
animalHospitalBeginnerGuide.intro: Animal Hospital is a Roblox survival horror game where you work night shifts in a strange animal clinic. Balance hospital duties with anomaly checks, because admitting the wrong patient can create dangerous threats and drain Sanity.

steps.title: Start the shift at the front desk
steps.description: Patients arrive at the check-in area, and you decide whether they are normal patients or suspicious anomalies.
steps.tip: Do not rush every patient into treatment. A fast mistake can create more danger later.

steps.title: Inspect each patient before accepting them
steps.description: Look at the patient in person, use photos, and check CCTV when needed. Warning signs include strange eyes, sharp teeth, twitching, and distorted body parts.
steps.tip: Use a consistent routine: visual check, camera check, photo check.

steps.title: Reject anomalies with the shutters
steps.description: When a patient shows anomaly signs, use the shutter button at the desk to send them away before they enter the hospital.
steps.tip: Correctly rejecting anomalies improves shift results and helps prevent Skinwalker problems.

steps.title: Treat normal patients correctly
steps.description: Accepted patients move into treatment rooms. Use the computer, diagnostics, and listed medicine or treatment items to cure them.
steps.tip: Giving the wrong treatment can kill a normal patient, so match the treatment screen carefully.

steps.title: Keep Sanity above zero
steps.description: Sanity is the real survival meter. Anomalies, enemies, rituals, and scary events drain it, while Coffee and food restore it.
steps.tip: Buy useful items between shifts and carry Sanity recovery when possible.

steps.title: Earn cash and Animal Coins
steps.description: Surviving shifts rewards money for items and Animal Coins for classes. Better classes make later shifts easier through Sanity boosts, movement, inventory, or weapons.
steps.tip: New players should focus on stable shift clears before chasing risky anomaly hunts.

quickTips: Always run visual, camera, and photo checks before admitting a patient.
Close the shutters the moment a visitor looks wrong.
Save Coffee for camera duty, rituals, and emergency rooms.
Split team roles: one on check-in, one on treatment, one ready for threats.
Match the treatment screen exactly to avoid killing normal patients.

animalHospitalAnomalies.title: Animal Hospital Anomalies Guide
animalHospitalAnomalies.intro: Anomaly detection is the most important skill in Animal Hospital. Inspect each visitor through multiple checks before admitting them, then reject anything suspicious with the front desk shutters.

categories.action: Reject the patient immediately with the shutters when these signs appear at the desk.
Use lobby cameras when the patient looks normal in person but still feels suspicious.

checks: Photo does not match the patient
Facial parts differ from the live patient
categories.action: Reject the patient after photo confirmation, and avoid staring at cursed photos too long.

checks: Skinwalkers may attack players or patients
Tasers and guns handle direct threats
categories.action: Clear missed anomalies fast, protect Sanity, and resume treatment once the threat is gone.

checks: Wall Bangers near the front desk
Wall anomalies that chase or steal items
categories.action: Follow the event-specific counter instead of treating every threat like a patient anomaly.

animalHospitalClasses.title: Animal Hospital Classes Tier List
animalHospitalClasses.intro: Classes change how each shift feels by adding Sanity bonuses, inventory space, movement tools, treatment perks, or weapons. Most classes use Animal Coins earned from shifts, while premium options such as Head Nurse and Secret Agent use Robux.

tiers.summary: Best overall classes for strong survival value, late-game scaling, or premium power.

classes.name: Surgeon
classes.perk: Gains Sanity and a speed boost after healing patients.
classes.bestFor: Solo players, treatment-focused players, long shift streaks

classes.name: Secret Agent
classes.perk: Starts with a gun; higher levels add bonus Sanity and regenerate one use each round.
classes.bestFor: Premium players, anomaly control, dangerous late-shift situations

classes.name: Head Nurse
classes.perk: Adds inventory capacity; Level 3 starts each round with Special Technique.
classes.bestFor: Support players, emergency treatment, busy team runs

tiers.summary: Strong value classes that are practical for most players and easier to build around.

classes.name: Doctor
classes.perk: Recovers Sanity when healing patients and gains higher starting Sanity later.
classes.bestFor: Patient treatment, mid-game progression, stable solo runs

classes.name: Psychologist
classes.perk: Doubles positive and negative Sanity effects; can ignore some Sanity loss at higher levels.
classes.bestFor: Experienced players, Sanity management, careful support play

classes.name: Secretary
classes.perk: Recovers Sanity when checking in patients; later levels add bonus Sanity.

classes.name: Security
classes.perk: Starts with an X-Taser; higher levels add more uses and round-based regeneration.
classes.bestFor: Team defense, Skinwalker control, players who want a weapon without Robux

tiers.summary: Useful classes with clear roles, but less overall value than the options above.

classes.name: Paramedic
classes.perk: Starts with Large Speed Cola; higher levels regenerate one use each round.
classes.bestFor: Fires, fainted patients, ambulance events, fast responders

classes.name: Nurse
classes.perk: Adds up to +3 maximum inventory capacity by Level 3.
classes.bestFor: New players, item carriers, low-cost support

tiers.summary: Starter class used mainly while learning the game and saving for better options.

classes.name: Intern
classes.perk: Starts with bonus Sanity that increases from +10 to +20 across levels.
classes.bestFor: First shifts, learning controls, saving Animal Coins

animalHospitalSanity.title: Animal Hospital Sanity Guide
animalHospitalSanity.intro: Sanity is the main survival meter in Animal Hospital. Every shift mixes patient treatment with anomaly detection, and Sanity drops when players make risky mistakes, stare at dangerous clues, or get caught by hostile events. Good players protect it by avoiding anomaly mistakes, saving Coffee for danger moments, and choosing a class that matches their role. The safest team keeps one player on check-in, one on treatment, and one ready with Coffee or a Taser when the run gets messy.

risks.label: Zero Sanity
risks.whatHappens: If Sanity reaches 0, the player dies and can no longer safely continue the shift.
commonCauses: Taking damage from Skinwalkers or hostile events
Looking too long at Sanity-draining camera, photo, or ceiling threats
Handling rituals or hazards while already low
risks.bestResponse: Back away from the threat, stop looking at cursed visual clues, drink Coffee or food, and let a teammate take over the risky task.

risks.label: Coffee and Food
risks.whatHappens: Coffee and shop food are used to restore Sanity during long shifts.
risks.bestResponse: Do not spend Coffee too early. Save it for camera duty, emergency rooms, rituals, or the player who is already doing the most dangerous tasks.

risks.label: Anomaly Mistakes
risks.whatHappens: Missed anomalies can become Skinwalkers and pressure both patients and players.
commonCauses: Not closing the shutters when the visitor looks wrong
Checking in too many visitors before confirming anomalies
risks.bestResponse: Reject obvious anomalies at the front desk, use cameras and photos before admitting suspicious patients, and keep a Taser ready after later shifts.

risks.label: Class Choice
risks.whatHappens: Some classes directly help Sanity while others help indirectly through inventory, speed, treatment, or combat control.

recommendedClasses.name: Intern
recommendedClasses.useCase: Best beginner safety pick because it starts with bonus Sanity and has no extra mechanic to manage.

recommendedClasses.name: Secretary
recommendedClasses.useCase: Good for reception players because its perk rewards check-in work with Sanity recovery.

recommendedClasses.name: Doctor
recommendedClasses.useCase: Good for treatment-focused players because it recovers Sanity when healing patients.

recommendedClasses.name: Psychologist
recommendedClasses.useCase: Advanced pick with doubled Sanity effects, making both recovery and mistakes stronger.

recommendedClasses.name: Surgeon
recommendedClasses.useCase: Strong treatment role that gains Sanity and speed after healing patients.

risks.bestResponse: Pick the class based on your job: reception needs Secretary, treatment needs Doctor or Surgeon, and new players should start with Intern.

animalHospitalItems.title: Animal Hospital Items and Treatments Guide
animalHospitalItems.intro: Most normal patients need correct room tasks and correct treatment items, and the biggest mistake is giving the wrong item, because that can kill a normal patient and damage the shift score. Animal Hospital treatment is simple once the team splits the work: check in the visitor, confirm they are not an anomaly, send them to the right room, finish the room task, then give the required treatment. Emergencies can interrupt this flow, so know which tools are for Sanity, which are for enemies, and which are only for patient care.

rows.whereUsed: Reception, camera duty, rituals, long shifts
rows.whatItDoes: Restores Sanity and helps players recover after dangerous anomaly or event interactions.
rows.mistakeToAvoid: Do not waste it early when the team has not reached dangerous events yet.

rows.whatItDoes: Stops hostile anomaly patients after they get through check-in.
rows.mistakeToAvoid: Do not rely on weapons for every environmental enemy; some hazards require special handling instead.

rows.whatItDoes: Acts as a stronger ranged tool for dangerous hostile situations.
rows.mistakeToAvoid: Do not fire carelessly near patients, because weapons can create extra patient problems.

rows.whereUsed: Room fires and burning patient emergencies
rows.whatItDoes: Clears fires faster than putting them out by hand.
rows.mistakeToAvoid: After a burning patient is safe, continue the patient flow and apply the correct follow-up treatment.

rows.whatItDoes: Used after a burning patient has been extinguished.
rows.mistakeToAvoid: Do not rush the normal photo and treatment flow before dealing with the burn state.

rows.whatItDoes: Analyze the patient, then give the required hallway treatment items.
rows.mistakeToAvoid: Giving the wrong treatment item kills a normal patient.

rows.whatItDoes: Complete the flashing-square sequence, then give the required treatment items.
rows.mistakeToAvoid: If the sequence fails, redo it before treating; do not guess the final item.

rows.whatItDoes: Click the correct icons, avoid skulls, then finish treatment after the monitor task is complete.
rows.mistakeToAvoid: Do not panic-click skulls, because they slow the room task and waste time.

rows.whatItDoes: Use the surgery-room tools shown on the screen, including surgery-specific tools such as Scissors and Scalpels.
rows.mistakeToAvoid: Once surgery starts, finish it immediately; leaving or using the wrong tool kills the patient.

rows.whatItDoes: Common starter treatments used in the early shift flow.
rows.mistakeToAvoid: Do not over-check-in patients before the first treatment items are ready.

animalHospitalCoins.title: Animal Hospital Animal Coins and Upgrades Guide
animalHospitalCoins.intro: Animal Coins are the long-term currency for class progression, while shift cash is used for run items and shop supplies, and the best spending path depends on whether you play reception, treatment, support, or anomaly control. New players should not spend Animal Coins randomly. Start with simple survival value, then move into a role-specific class once your team knows who handles check-in, treatment rooms, and emergencies. Class upgrades matter because every class has three levels that improve Sanity bonuses, utility effects, starter items, or passive abilities.

cards.title: Understand the Two Currencies
cards.value: Animal Coins are permanent progression currency used for classes. Cash earned during a run is used for shop items and upgrades such as Coffee, Tasers, and supplies.
cards.buyAdvice: Use run cash to survive the current shift, then use Animal Coins to improve your next runs.

cards.title: Beginner Safety Path
cards.bestFor: New solo players and first teams
cards.value: Intern gives beginner-friendly bonus Sanity, Nurse adds inventory capacity, and Secretary supports reception play with Sanity recovery from check-ins.
cards.buyAdvice: Start with Intern, then buy Nurse or Secretary depending on whether you carry treatments or work the front desk.

cards.title: Mid-Game Utility Path
cards.bestFor: Players with a fixed team role
cards.value: Paramedic improves movement with Speed Cola, Psychologist doubles Sanity effects for advanced players, and Doctor rewards patient healing with Sanity recovery.
cards.buyAdvice: Pick Paramedic for fast emergency response, Doctor for treatment rooms, and Psychologist only if you manage Sanity carefully.

cards.title: Anomaly Control Path
cards.value: Security starts with an X-Taser, making it useful when missed anomalies turn into active threats.
cards.buyAdvice: Buy Security when your team often lets anomalies through or needs one player assigned to threat control.

cards.title: Late-Game Treatment Path
cards.value: Surgeon rewards patient healing with Sanity and movement speed, making it strong for players who spend most of the shift in treatment rooms.
cards.buyAdvice: Save for Surgeon after you already understand room tasks, surgery timing, and emergency routing.

cards.title: Robux Class Options
cards.bestFor: Players who want premium role shortcuts
cards.value: Head Nurse is a flexible support class, while Secret Agent starts with a gun and fits combat-focused anomaly control.
cards.buyAdvice: Use these only if you want their exact role; Animal Coin classes already cover the main survival jobs.

cards.title: Upgrade After Choosing a Main Class
cards.value: Every class has three levels, and upgrades improve perks such as bonus Sanity, inventory capacity, starter items, or passive effects.
cards.buyAdvice: Do not spread upgrades too thin. Choose one main role first, then upgrade the class you use most.

animalHospitalUpdates.title: Animal Hospital Updates and Events
animalHospitalUpdates.intro: Animal Hospital changes quickly, so returning players should check official Roblox events, the Roblox community page, and the official Discord before jumping back into a long shift. The game is built around live survival runs, new anomaly behavior, class balance, and community-discovered secrets. This update feed is designed for players who already know the basics and want a fast view of what changed, what is coming next, and which official channels to follow.

entries.headline: Next Update Event Window
details: The Roblox event page lists the next Animal Hospital update window from Jul 10, 9:00 AM to Jul 12, 9:00 AM.
Announced highlights include Harlow interactions and a new [REDACTED] interaction.
entries.playerImpact: Check the event page before starting a long run because new interactions can change route planning and late-shift decisions.

entries.headline: Discord Update Hub
details: The official Discord server presents itself as the main Animal Hospital community hub.
Its listed focus includes codes, weekly updates, update alerts, strategy guides, and patch notes.
entries.playerImpact: Use the Discord for fast announcements, party finding, update alerts, and community-discovered anomaly behavior.

entries.headline: New Anomalies and Classes Keep Changing Runs
details: Animal Hospital is described as a survival horror multiplayer Roblox game with evolving anomalies and classes.
The class pool includes Intern, Nurse, Secretary, Paramedic, Psychologist, Doctor, Security, Head Nurse, Surgeon, and Secret Agent.
entries.playerImpact: Returning players should re-check class perks and anomaly tells before copying old strategies.

entries.headline: Roblox Page and Animal Anomaly Community
details: The Roblox game page identifies the experience as Animal Hospital (Anomaly) by Animal Anomaly.
The description frames the core loop as working the night shift, treating patients, and dealing with patients who are acting weird.
entries.playerImpact: Use the Roblox page for the official play link and the Animal Anomaly community page for creator-side updates.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Animal Hospital on Roblox

questions.question: What is Animal Hospital on Roblox?
questions.answer: Animal Hospital (Anomaly) is a Roblox survival horror game where players work night shifts in a strange animal clinic, treat patients, detect anomalies, and survive scary events.

questions.question: How do I redeem Animal Hospital codes?
questions.answer: Animal Hospital does not have a public code redemption flow yet. Watch the official Discord and Roblox group for future code drops and a redeem system.

questions.question: What is Sanity in Animal Hospital?
questions.answer: Sanity is the main survival meter in Animal Hospital. It drops from anomaly mistakes, hostile events, and dangerous clues, and recovers with Coffee and food. If it hits zero, your player dies.

questions.question: How do I spot anomalies in Animal Hospital?
questions.answer: Check each visitor in person, on CCTV, and with photos. Reject strange eyes, sharp teeth, distorted bodies, photo mismatches, or camera-only twitching using the front desk shutters.

questions.question: What are Animal Coins used for in Animal Hospital?
questions.answer: Animal Coins are the permanent progression currency used to unlock classes like Secretary, Doctor, Security, and Surgeon. Shift cash is separate and used for shop items during a run.

questions.question: Is Animal Hospital multiplayer?
questions.answer: Yes. Animal Hospital is a multiplayer survival horror game that supports up to 30 players, so teams can split check-in, treatment, and anomaly defense roles across a shift.
